change_comments.message:
sdc-cs failure during installation:
```
Error: failed to create containerd task: failed to create shim task: OCI runtime create failed: runc create failed: unable to start container process: error during container init: exec: "/home/sdc/startup.sh": permission denied: unknown
```

inline_comments.message:
sdc-be just need to wait for sdc-onboarding-be service as sdc-onboarding-be already waits for its job to be ready.
Addifionally the message-router is deprecated and this option can be removed
We don't need this init-container as chef has been removed.

we need these mentioned value as per our testing.

     livenessProbe:
        failureThreshold: 3
        httpGet:
          path: /app-health/sdc-be-job/livez
          port: 15020
          scheme: HTTP
        initialDelaySeconds: 60
        periodSeconds: 10
        successThreshold: 1
        timeoutSeconds: 180
      name: sdc-be-job
      readinessProbe:
        failureThreshold: 3
        httpGet:
          path: /app-health/sdc-be-job/readyz
          port: 15020
          scheme: HTTP
        initialDelaySeconds: 60
        periodSeconds: 10
        successThreshold: 1
        timeoutSeconds: 180
